description: Summarecon Mall Receipt Dataset - Demo sample receipts for the Document Intelligence Platform

receipts.title: Food Court Lunch Receipt
receipts.description: A typical lunch receipt from Summarecon Mall Food Court with member discount and QRIS payment.

receipts.title: Electronics Store Purchase
receipts.description: A mid-value electronics purchase with debit card payment. Standard retail transaction.

receipts.title: Fashion Weekend Shopping
receipts.description: A high-value fashion purchase with weekend promotion discount and credit card installment.

receipts.title: Suspicious Cash Transaction
receipts.description: A high-risk receipt with unregistered merchant, missing tax, unusual hours, and high-value cash payment.
